questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在将 AWS 用于其所有 IT 基础设施。该公司的开发人员可以自行部署应用程序。开发人员希望部署他们的应用程序而无需自己配置基础设施。开发人员应该使用哪种 AWS 服务来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is using AWS for all its IT infrastructure. The company's developers are allowed to deploy applications on their own. The developers want to deploy their applications without having to provision the infrastructure themselves. Which AWS service should the developers use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS CloudFormation
A.en: AWS CloudFormation

B.zh: AWS CodeBuild
B.en: AWS CodeBuild

C.zh: AWS Elastic Beanstalk
C.en: AWS Elastic Beanstalk

D.zh: AWS CodeDeploy
D.en: AWS CodeDeploy

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：CloudFormation 是一项基础设施即代码 (IaC) 服务，用于定义和管理 AWS 资源的模板。虽然它可以帮助自动化创建资源，但它并不直接支持应用程序开发。开发人员仍然需要定义模板和管理资源。因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudFormation is an Infrastructure as a Infrastructure (IaC) service for defining and managing templates for AWS resources. Although it can help automate the creation of resources, it does not directly support application development. Developers still need to define templates and manage resources. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CodeBuild 用于编译源代码、运行测试并生成软件包，但不负责自动配置和管理应用程序运行所需的基础设施。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CodeBuild is a persistent integration service for compiling code, running tests, and generating software packages. It is not responsible for parts of the application, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Elastic Beanstalk 是一个平台即服务 (PaaS)，允许开发人员上传代码并自动处理应用程序部署、负载平衡、扩展和控制。完全符合题目要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Elastic Beanstalk is a platform as a service (PaaS) that allows developers to upload code and automatically handle application deployment, load balancing, scaling and control. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：CodeDeploy 是一种部署服务，用于自动化应用程序的部署流程，但它需要开发人员定义部署配置，并且不提供自动化的基础设施管理。因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CodeDeploy is a deployment service that is used to automate the deployment process of applications, but it requires developers to define deployment configurations and does not provide automated infrastructure management. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Elastic Beanstalk 是一个平台即服务 (PaaS)，允许开发人员上传代码并自动处理应用程序部署、负载平衡、扩展和控制。完全符合题目要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Elastic Beanstalk is a platform as a service (PaaS) that allows developers to upload code and automatically handle application deployment, load balancing, scaling and control. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望从其数据中获得见解并创建交互式数据可视化仪表板。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to gain insights from its data and build interactive data visualization dashboards. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon SageMaker
A.en: Amazon SageMaker

B.zh: Amazon Rekognition
B.en: Amazon Rekognition

C.zh: Amazon QuickSight
C.en: Amazon QuickSight

D.zh: Amazon Kinesis
D.en: Amazon Kinesis

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon SageMaker 是一项用于构建、训练和部署机器学习模型的机器学习服务。虽然它可以处理数据，但它并不专注于数据可视化，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a machine learning service for building, training, and deploying machine learning models. Although it can handle data, it is not focused on data visualization, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Rekognition 是一项图像和视频分析服务，用于识别物体、人脸、场景等。它与数据可视化无关，因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an image and video analysis service for identifying objects, faces, scenes, and more. It has nothing to do with data visualization, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon QuickSight 是一项商业智能服务，旨在创建交互式数据可视化仪表板并产生数据见解。该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a business intelligence service designed for creating interactive data visualization dashboards and generating data insights. This option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Kinesis 是一种实时数据流服务，用于收集、处理和分析流数据。虽然它可以处理数据，但它不会直接用于创建数据可视化仪表板，因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a real-time data streaming service for collecting, processing, and analyzing streaming data. Although it can process data, it is not directly used to create data visualization dashboards, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon QuickSight 是一项商业智能服务，旨在创建交互式数据可视化仪表板并产生数据见解。该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a business intelligence service designed for creating interactive data visualization dashboards and generating data insights. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一位云工程师想要将数据存储在 Amazon S3 中。工程师将每年访问一些数据，每天访问一些数据。哪种 S3 存储类别能够最经济高效地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A cloud engineer wants to store data in Amazon S3. The engineer will access some of the data yearly and some of the data daily. Which S3 storage class will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: S3 标准
A.en: S3 Standard

B.zh: S3 冰河深度存盘
B.en: S3 Glacier Deep Archive

C.zh: S3 一区-不频繁访问（S3 一区-IA）
C.en: S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)

D.zh: S3 智能分层
D.en: S3 Intelligent-Tiering

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3标准适合频繁访问的数据，存储成本较高。不适合某些数据一年只访问一次的场景。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: S3 Standard is suitable for frequently accessed data and has high storage costs. It is not suitable for scenarios where some data is only accessed once a year. Conclusion: Wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 Glacier Deep Archive 适合长期存储很少被访问的数据。检索时间较长，不适合日常访问的数据。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: S3 Glacier Deep Archive is suitable for long-term storage of data that is rarely accessed. The retrieval time is long and is not suitable for data that is accessed daily. Conclusion: Wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 One Zone-IA 适合不常访问的数据。但由于数据仅存储在一个可用区，可靠性较低，因此不适合日常访问部分数据的场景。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: S3 One Zone-IA is suitable for data that is accessed infrequently. However, since the data is only stored in one availability zone, the reliability is low and it is not suitable for scenarios where some data is accessed on a daily basis. Conclusion: Wrong.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：S3智能分层根据访问模式自动将数据移至性价比最高的存储层，适合访问频率不确定的数据，满足每日访问部分数据和每年访问部分数据的需求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: S3 Intelligent-Tiering automatically moves data to the most cost-effective storage tier based on access patterns, which is suitable for data with uncertain access frequency and meets the needs of daily access to some data and annual access to some data. Conclusion:.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：S3智能分层根据访问模式自动将数据移至性价比最高的存储层，适合访问频率不确定的数据，满足每日访问部分数据和每年访问部分数据的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: S3 Intelligent-Tiering automatically moves data to the most cost-effective storage tier based on access patterns, which is suitable for data with uncertain access frequency and meets the needs of daily access to some data and annual access to some data. Conclusion:.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 下列哪些是使用 AWS 云的经济效益？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are economic benefits of using the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 基于消费的定价
A.en: Consumption-based pricing

B.zh: 永久许可证
B.en: Perpetual licenses

C.zh: 规模经济
C.en: Economies of scale

D.zh: AWS 企业支持，无需额外付费
D.en: AWS Enterprise Support at no additional cost

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 采用即用即付的定价模式。用户只需为实际使用的资源付费，这是经济效益的重要体现。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS adopts a pay-as-you-go pricing model. Users only pay for the resources actually used, which is an important manifestation of economic benefits.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS不采用永久授权模式，而是基于订阅和按需付费，这与云计算的灵活性和经济性是一致的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS does not use a permanent license model, but is based on subscription and pay-as-you-go, which is consistent with the flexibility and economics of cloud computing.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS通过大规模运维降低成本，并将这些成本节省转嫁给客户，这是云计算的重要经济效益。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations and passes these cost savings to customers, which is an important economic benefit of cloud computing.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Enterprise Support 是一项付费服务，不包含在云经济中。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Enterprise Support is a paid service and is not included in the economics of the cloud.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 是一个完全托管的云服务平台。用户不需要自备硬件，这与云计算的经济效益无关。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS is a fully managed cloud service platform. Users do not need to bring their own hardware, which has nothing to do with the economic benefits of cloud computing.

answer_text.zh: A. 基于消费的定价；C. 规模经济
answer_text.en: A. Consumption-based pricing; C. Economies of scale

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 采用即用即付的定价模式。用户只需为实际使用的资源付费，这是经济效益的重要体现。；AWS通过大规模运维降低成本，并将这些成本节省转嫁给客户，这是云计算的重要经济效益。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS adopts a pay-as-you-go pricing model. Users only pay for the resources actually used, which is an important manifestation of economic benefits.; AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations and passes these cost savings to customers, which is an important economic benefit of cloud computing.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 用户正在将工作负载从本地数据中心移至分布在本地数据中心和 AWS 云之间的架构。这是哪种类型的迁移？
question_text.en: A user is moving a workload from a local data center to an architecture that is distributed between the local data center and the AWS Cloud. Which type of migration is this?

A.zh: 本地到云原生
A.en: On-premises to cloud native

B.zh: 混合到云原生
B.en: Hybrid to cloud native

C.zh: 本地到混合
C.en: On-premises to hybrid

D.zh: 云原生到混合
D.en: Cloud native to hybrid

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：题目描述了本地数据中心和 AWS 云之间的工作负载分配。此架构是混合架构，并不是完全迁移到云原生架构。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The title describes the distribution of workloads between local data centers and the AWS cloud. This architecture is a hybrid architecture and is not a complete migration to a cloud-native architecture.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：标题没有提到从混合架构迁移到云原生架构，而是从本地数据中心迁移到混合架构。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The title does not mention migrating from a hybrid architecture to a cloud-native architecture, but rather migrating from a local data center to a hybrid architecture.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：标题明确指出工作负载分布在本地数据中心和AWS云之间。这种类型的迁移是从本地数据中心到混合架构的迁移。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The title clearly states that the workload is distributed between the local data center and the AWS cloud. This type of migration is a migration from the local data center to a hybrid architecture.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：标题没有提到从云原生架构迁移到混合架构，而是从本地数据中心迁移到混合架构。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The title does not mention migrating from cloud native architecture to hybrid architecture, but migrating from local data center to hybrid architecture.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (86%) 14%。热门讨论与考点摘要：标题明确指出工作负载分布在本地数据中心和AWS云之间。这种类型的迁移是从本地数据中心到混合架构的迁移。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (86%) 14%. Popular discussion and key point summary: The title clearly states that the workload is distributed between the local data center and the AWS cloud. This type of migration is a migration from the local data center to a hybrid architecture.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 某公司需要存储不常用的数据，用于数据存盘和长期备份。哪种 AWS 服务或存储类别能够最经济高效地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to store infrequently used data for data archives and long-term backups. Which AWS service or storage class will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: Amazon FSx for Lustre
A.en: Amazon FSx for Lustre

B.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)
B.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)

C.zh: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

D.zh: Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval
D.en: Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon FSx for Lustre 是一款高性能文件服务器，主要针对高吞吐量和低延迟工作负载（例如机器学习或高性能计算）而设计。它不适合长期存储或不经常访问的数据，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon FSx for Luster is a high-performance file server designed primarily for high-throughput and low-latency workloads such as machine learning or high-performance computing. It is not suitable for long-term storage or infrequently accessed data, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EBS 是一种块存储服务，适合运行 EC2 实例的高性能存储需求。 EBS价格昂贵，不适合长期存储或低频访问数据，所以这个选择是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EBS is a block storage service suitable for the high-performance storage needs of running EC2 instances. EBS is expensive and not suitable for long-term storage or low-frequency access to data, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EFS 是一种可扩展文件存储服务，用于多个 EC2 实例的共用存储。尽管EFS支持生命周期管理来优化成本，但其成本仍然高于专用于归档的存储服务，因此这个选择是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EFS is a scalable file storage service for shared storage of multiple EC2 instances. Although EFS supports lifecycle management to optimize costs, its cost is still higher than storage services dedicated to archiving, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval 是专为长期存储和低频访问数据而设计的存储设备。它具有极低的存储成本并提供灵活的检测因此符合题目要求。该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a storage device specifically designed for long-term storage and low-frequency access to data. It has extremely low storage costs and provides flexible detection options. This option is.

answer_text.zh: D. Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval
answer_text.en: D. Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval 是专为长期存储和低频访问数据而设计的存储设备。它具有极低的存储成本并提供灵活的检测因此符合题目要求。该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a storage device specifically designed for long-term storage and low-frequency access to data. It has extremely low storage costs and provides flexible detection options. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务为用户提供 AWS 发布的报告、认证、鉴定和第三方证明？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides users with AWS issued reports, certifications, accreditations, and third-party attestations?

A.zh: AWS Artifact
A.en: AWS Artifact

B.zh: AWS Trusted Advisor
B.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

C.zh: AWS Health Dashboard
C.en: AWS Health Dashboard

D.zh: AWS Config
D.en: AWS Config

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Artifact 是一个自助服务门户，提供合规性相关文档，包括 AWS 报告、认证、第三方认证等。这正是问题中要求的功能。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Artifact is a self-service portal that provides compliance-related documents, including AWS reports, certifications, third-party certifications, etc. This is exactly the function requested in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Trusted Advisor 主要用于检查用户的 AWS 环境并提供优化建议（例如成本节省、安全性、性能等），而不是提供合规性文档。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor is mainly used to check the user's AWS environment and provide optimization recommendations (such as cost savings, security, performance, etc.) rather than providing compliance documents.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Health Dashboard 提供与 AWS 服务运行状态相关的信息，以协助用户了解服务中断或事件的影响，但与合规性文档无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Health Dashboard provides information related to the operating status of AWS services to help users understand the impact of service interruptions or events, but has nothing to do with compliance documents.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Config 用于记录和审核资源配置变更并协助用户管理合规性，但它不提供 AWS 报告、认证或第三方认证。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Config is used to record and audit resource configuration changes and help users manage compliance, but it does not provide AWS reports, certifications or third-party certifications.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Artifact 是一个自助服务门户，提供合规性相关文档，包括 AWS 报告、认证、第三方认证等。这正是问题中要求的功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Artifact is a self-service portal that provides compliance-related documents, including AWS reports, certifications, third-party certifications, etc. This is exactly the function requested in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司需要创建和发布交互式商业智能仪表板。仪表板需要由机器学习提供支持的见解。哪种 AWS 服务或工具可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to create and publish interactive business intelligence dashboards. The dashboards require insights that are powered by machine learning. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Glue Studio
A.en: AWS Glue Studio

B.zh: Amazon QuickSight
B.en: Amazon QuickSight

C.zh: Amazon Redshift
C.en: Amazon Redshift

D.zh: Amazon Athena
D.en: Amazon Athena

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Glue Studio 是一个用于创建、运行和监控数据集成工作流程的可视化工具。它主要用于数据预处理和 ETL（提取、转换、加载）任务，而不是创建和发布交互式商业智能仪表板。因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a visual tool for creating, running, and monitoring data integration workflows. It is primarily used for data preprocessing and ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) tasks rather than creating and publishing interactive business intelligence dashboards. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon QuickSight 是一种商业智能服务，可创建和发布交互式仪表板，并可通过预测和异常检测等内置机器学习功能提供数据见解。这是题要求的功能，所以该选项符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a business intelligence service that enables the creation and publishing of interactive dashboards and can provide data insights through built-in machine learning capabilities such as prediction and anomaly detection. This is the function required by the question, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Redshift 是一种数据仓库服务，主要用于存储和查询大规模结构化数据。虽然它可以作为数据分析的基础，但它本身并没有提供创建和发布交互式仪表板的功能。因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a data warehouse service primarily used to store and query large-scale structured data. While it can serve as a basis for data analysis, it does not natively provide the functionality to create and publish interactive dashboards. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Athena 是一项交互式查询服务，用于分析 Amazon S3 中存储的数据。它适合运行SQL查询，但不支持创建和发布交互式仪表板。因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an interactive query service for analyzing data stored in Amazon S3. It is suitable for executing SQL queries, but does not support creating and publishing interactive dashboards. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon QuickSight 是一种商业智能服务，可创建和发布交互式仪表板，并可通过预测和异常检测等内置机器学习功能提供数据见解。这是题要求的功能，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a business intelligence service that enables the creation and publishing of interactive dashboards and can provide data insights through built-in machine learning capabilities such as prediction and anomaly detection. This is the function required by the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要使用 AWS。该公司对本地系统的低延迟访问和数据驻留有严格的要求。公司应使用哪种 AWS 服务来设计符合这些要求的解决方案？
question_text.en: A company wants to use AWS. The company has stringent requirements about low-latency access to on-premises systems and data residency. Which AWS service should the company use to design a solution that meets these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Wavelength
A.en: AWS Wavelength

B.zh: AWS Transit Gateway
B.en: AWS Transit Gateway

C.zh: AWS Ground Station
C.en: AWS Ground Station

D.zh: AWS Outposts
D.en: AWS Outposts

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Wavelength主要用于将AWS服务延伸到电信运维商5G网络边缘，以支持超低延迟的应用场景，但它并未直接解决数据驻留或与本地系统集成的问题。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Wavelength is mainly used to extend AWS services to the edge of telecom operators' 5G networks to support ultra-low latency application scenarios, but it does not directly solve the problem of data residency or integration with local systems.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Transit Gateway 用于连接多个 VPC 和本地网络，但主要是一种网络连接解决方案，无法满足数据驻留的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Transit Gateway is used to connect multiple VPCs and local networks, but it is mainly a network connection solution and cannot meet the requirements of data residency.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Ground Station 是一项独立于低延迟访问和数据驻留的卫星通信服务。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Ground Station is a satellite communications service that is independent of low-latency access and data residency.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Outposts 是一种混合云解决方案，可将 AWS 服务扩展到本地数据中心，以满足低延迟访问和数据驻留需求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts is a hybrid cloud solution that extends AWS services to local data centers to meet low-latency access and data residency needs.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Outposts 是一种混合云解决方案，可将 AWS 服务扩展到本地数据中心，以满足低延迟访问和数据驻留需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts is a hybrid cloud solution that extends AWS services to local data centers to meet low-latency access and data residency needs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司为客户经营本地联系中心。该公司需要迁移到基于云的解决方案，该解决方案可以提供人工智能功能以改善用户体验。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an on-premises contact center for customers. The company needs to migrate to a cloud-based solution that can deliver artificial intelligence features to improve user experience. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Wavelength
A.en: AWS Wavelength

B.zh: AWS IAM Identity Center（原 AWS Single Sign-On）
B.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

C.zh: AWS Direct Connect
C.en: AWS Direct Connect

D.zh: Amazon Connect
D.en: Amazon Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Wavelength 主要用于将AWS服务扩展到5G网络边缘，以实现低延迟应用程序。这与问题中提到的将客户交互中心迁移到云无关，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is mainly used to extend AWS services to the edge of 5G networks to enable low-latency applications. This has nothing to do with migrating the customer interaction center to the cloud as mentioned in the question, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS IAM Identity Center用于集中管理用户访问权限，与问题中提到的客户交互中心和人工智能功能无关，因此AWS IAM Identity Center（原 AWS Single Sign-On） 是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS IAM Identity Center is used to centrally manage user access rights and has nothing to do with the customer interaction center and artificial intelligence functions mentioned in the question, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Direct Connect 用于在本地数据中心和AWS之间创建私有网络连接。虽然它可以用于迁移，但它不提供客户交互中心或人工智能功能，因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is used to establish a private network connection between the local data center and AWS. Although it can be used for migration, it does not provide customer interaction center or artificial intelligence capabilities, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是一种云联系中心解决方案，支持客户交互并集成人工智能功能（例如 Amazon Lex 和 Amazon Polly）以改善用户体验。因此该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a cloud contact center solution that supports customer interactions and integrates artificial intelligence capabilities (such as Amazon Lex and Amazon Polly) to improve the user experience. Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Connect 是一种云联系中心解决方案，支持客户交互并集成人工智能功能（例如 Amazon Lex 和 Amazon Polly）以改善用户体验。因此该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a cloud contact center solution that supports customer interactions and integrates artificial intelligence capabilities (such as Amazon Lex and Amazon Polly) to improve the user experience. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司需要有能力在需要资源时取得资源。公司还需要能够在不再需要资源时释放资源。哪个 AWS 概念代表了公司的目标？
question_text.en: A company needs the ability to acquire resources when the resources are needed. The company also needs the ability to release the resources when the resources are no longer needed. Which AWS concept represents the company's goals?

A.zh: 可扩展性
A.en: Scalability

B.zh: 可持续性
B.en: Sustainability

C.zh: 弹性
C.en: Elasticity

D.zh: 卓越运营
D.en: Operational excellence

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可扩展性强调系统随需求增长而扩展的能力，不一定包含在需求下降时释放资源，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the system's ability to expand resources as demand grows to accommodate higher load demands. Although related to elasticity, it emphasizes the ability to scale rather than releasing resources on demand. The cup option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可持续性关注减少资源消耗和环境影响，与按需获取和释放资源无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is often associated with environmental responsibility, which refers to reducing resource consumption and carbon footprint. This has nothing to do with the ability to acquire and release resources on demand, because the cup option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：弹性是指根据需求动态增加或减少资源，包括在不再需要资源时将其释放，完全符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is one of the core concepts of AWS, which refers to dynamically adjusting resources according to demand, including expanding and shrinking resources on demand. This is the goal described in the question, so the cup and cup options are.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：卓越运营关注运行、监控和持续改进系统，与按需获取和释放资源不是同一概念。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework. It is related to optimizing operational processes and improving efficiency. It is not directly related to the dynamic adjustment of resources. Due to the wrong options.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：弹性是指根据需求动态增加或减少资源，包括在不再需要资源时将其释放，完全符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is one of the core concepts of AWS, which refers to dynamically adjusting resources according to demand, including expanding and shrinking resources on demand. This is the goal described in the question, so the cup and cup options are.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用 Amazon EC2 实例来实现运行 1 年的稳定生产工作负载。哪一种实例购买选项最经济高效地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to use Amazon EC2 instances for a stable production workload that will run for 1 year. Which instance purchasing option meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 专用主机
A.en: Dedicated Hosts

B.zh: 预留实例
B.en: Reserved Instances

C.zh: 按需型实例
C.en: On-Demand Instances

D.zh: 竞价型实例
D.en: Spot Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：专用主机 提供物理服务器的独占使用权，适用于需要满足合规性或软件授权要求的场景。生产成本较高，不适合某些生产工作负载的成本优化需求，因此此选项是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: provide exclusive use rights to physical servers and are suitable for scenarios where compliance or software licensing requirements need to be met. The production cost is higher and is not suitable for the cost optimization needs of certain production workloads, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：预留实例 允许用户为长期工作负载预留容量，从而显著节省成本（高达 72%）。对于运行 1 年的固定生产工作负载，这是最具成本效益的选项，因此符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: allow users to reserve capacity for long-term workloads, providing significant cost savings (up to 72%). For a fixed production workload running for 1 year, this is the most cost-effective option, so this is the correct option.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：按需型实例 是即用即付的，适合周期性或不可预测的工作负载。虽然灵活，但成本较高且不适合长期生产工作负载，因此此选项是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: are pay-as-you-go and are suitable for periodic or unpredictable workloads. Although flexible, it is more expensive and not suitable for long-term production workloads, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：以低价提供未使用的 EC2 容量，但可能随时中断。它适合非任务关键型或可中断的工作负载，不适合某些生产工作负载，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: provide unused EC2 capacity at a low price but may be interrupted at any time. It is suitable for non-mission-critical or interruptible workloads and is not suitable for certain production workloads, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：预留实例 允许用户为长期工作负载预留容量，从而显著节省成本（高达 72%）。对于运行 1 年的固定生产工作负载，这是最具成本效益的选项，因此符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: allow users to reserve capacity for long-term workloads, providing significant cost savings (up to 72%). For a fixed production workload running for 1 year, this is the most cost-effective option, so this is the correct option.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望安全登录 Linux Amazon EC2 实例。公司如何实现这个目标？
question_text.en: A company wants to log in securely to Linux Amazon EC2 instances. How can the company accomplish this goal?

A.zh: 使用 SSH 密钥。
A.en: Use SSH keys.

B.zh: 使用 VPN。
B.en: Use a VPN.

C.zh: 使用端对端加密。
C.en: Use end-to-end encryption.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Route 53。
D.en: Use Amazon Route 53.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：SSH 是登录 Linux EC2 实例的建议方法。 AWS EC2实例使用SSH加密进行身份认证，确保安全。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: SSH is the recommended method of logging into a Linux EC2 instance. AWS EC2 instances use SSH encryption for identity authentication to ensure security.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：VPN 主要用于安全连接到专用网络，而不是直接登录 EC2 实例。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: VPNs are primarily used to securely connect to private networks, rather than directly logging into EC2 instances.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：端对端加密是一种数据传输的加密机制，与登录EC2实例所使用的身份凭证没有直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: End-to-end encryption is an encryption mechanism for data transmission and has no direct relationship with the identity certificate used to log in to the EC2 instance.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Route 53 是一项 DNS 服务，与登录 EC2 实例无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Route 53 is a DNS service and has nothing to do with logging into EC2 instances.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 SSH 密钥。

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：SSH 是登录 Linux EC2 实例的建议方法。 AWS EC2实例使用SSH加密进行身份认证，确保安全。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: SSH is the recommended method of logging into a Linux EC2 instance. AWS EC2 instances use SSH encryption for identity authentication to ensure security.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望为应用程序使用无服务器计算服务。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to use a serverless compute service for an application. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Lambda
A.en: AWS Lambda

B.zh: AWS CloudFormation
B.en: AWS CloudFormation

C.zh: AWS Elastic Beanstalk
C.en: AWS Elastic Beanstalk

D.zh: 弹性负载平衡
D.en: Elastic Load Balancing

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是一种完全与服务器无关的计算服务，可让用户在不管理服务器的情况下运行代码。它是专门为支持无服务器架构而设计的服务。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Lambda is a completely server-agnostic computing service that allows users to run code without managing servers. It is a service specifically designed to support serverless architecture.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CloudFormation 是一项基础设施即代码 (IaC) 服务，用于定义和管理 AWS 资源，但它不是计算服务，也不支持无服务器架构。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CloudFormation is an Infrastructure as Code (IaC) service for defining and managing AWS resources, but it is not a compute service and does not support Serverless architecture.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Elastic Beanstalk 是一种平台即服务 (PaaS)。虽然它简化了应用程序部署，但仍然需要底层服务器的管理，因此它不是 Serverless 服务。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Elastic Beanstalk is a Platform as a Service (PaaS). Although it simplifies application deployment, it still requires management of the underlying server, so it is not a Serverless service.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Elastic Load Balancing 是一种负载平衡服务，用于将流量分发到多个目标实例或容器，但它不是计算服务，不支持无服务器架构。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Elastic Load Balancing is a load balancing service used to distribute traffic to multiple target instances or containers, but it is not a computing service and does not support serverless architecture.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Lambda 是一种完全与服务器无关的计算服务，可让用户在不管理服务器的情况下运行代码。它是专门为支持无服务器架构而设计的服务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Lambda is a completely server-agnostic computing service that allows users to run code without managing servers. It is a service specifically designed to support serverless architecture.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要一种解决方案，能够根据目前负载自动调整正在使用的 Amazon EC2 实例的数量。哪种 AWS 产品可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants a solution that will automatically adjust the number of Amazon EC2 instances that are being used based on the current load. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 专用主机
A.en: Dedicated Hosts

B.zh: 置放群组
B.en: Placement groups

C.zh: Auto Scaling 组
C.en: Auto Scaling groups

D.zh: 预留实例
D.en: Reserved Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：专用主机为客户提供专用的物理 EC2 服务器，但不会根据负载自动调整实例数量。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: are dedicated hosts used to provide management servers, and are suitable for scenarios where compliance or permission is required. It does not have the function of automatically adjusting the number of EC2 instances according to the load, because the wrong option is used.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：置放群组用于控制 EC2 实例在底层硬件上的放置方式，以优化网络性能或降低相关故障风险，但不会自动调整实例数量。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: are used to optimize network performance or distribution strategies between EC2 instances, mainly used in high-performance computing scenarios. It has nothing to do with autoscaling the number of instances, as the option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Auto Scaling 组可以根据当前负载自动增加或减少 EC2 实例数量，符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a feature provided by AWS that automatically adjusts the number of EC2 instances based on load to ensure application performance and cost optimization. The cup options are.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：预留实例是一种基于长期承诺的计费折扣，不会根据负载自动调整实例数量。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an option for long-term reservation of EC2 instances to reduce costs. It does not have the function of dynamically adjusting the number of instances because of the wrong option.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Auto Scaling 组可以根据当前负载自动增加或减少 EC2 实例数量，符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a feature provided by AWS that automatically adjusts the number of EC2 instances based on load to ensure application performance and cost optimization. The cup options are.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在创建 AWS 架构，将实时数据源从本地数据中心发送到在 AWS 上运行的应用程序。该公司需要具有最小延迟的一致网络连接。公司应该使用什么来连接应用程序和数据中心来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building AWS architecture to deliver real-time data feeds from an on-premises data center into an application that runs on AWS. The company needs a consistent network connection with minimal latency. What should the company use to connect the application and the data center to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Direct Connect
A.en: AWS Direct Connect

B.zh: 公共互联网
B.en: Public internet

C.zh: AWS VPN
C.en: AWS VPN

D.zh: Amazon Connect
D.en: Amazon Connect

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一种专用的网络连接服务，可提供稳定、低延迟的连接，适用于需要高性能和一致网络连接的场景。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Direct Connect is a dedicated network connection service that provides stable, low-latency connections and is suitable for scenarios that require high performance and consistent network connections.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：公共网络访问可能会受到网络拥塞和不稳定的影响，并且无法保证低延迟和一致性。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Public Internet access may be affected by network congestion and instability, and low latency and consistency are not guaranteed.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然AWS VPN可以提供安全连接，但它依赖公共互联网，因此无法保证低延迟和稳定性。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS VPN can provide a secure connection, it relies on the public Internet and therefore cannot guarantee low latency and stability.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是联系中心服务，与网络连接无关，不适合此场景。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Connect is a contact center service that has nothing to do with network connectivity and is not suitable for this scenario.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Direct Connect 是一种专用的网络连接服务，可提供稳定、低延迟的连接，适用于需要高性能和一致网络连接的场景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Direct Connect is a dedicated network connection service that provides stable, low-latency connections and is suitable for scenarios that require high performance and consistent network connections.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司计划将其自定义行销应用程序和订单处理应用程序迁移到 AWS。该公司需要将应用程序部署在具有不同CPU、内存、存储和网络容量配置的不同类型的实例上。公司应该使用哪种 AWS 服务来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company plans to migrate its custom marketing application and order-processing application to AWS. The company needs to deploy the applications on different types of instances with various configurations of CPU, memory, storage, and networking capacity. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Lambda
A.en: AWS Lambda

B.zh: Amazon Cognito
B.en: Amazon Cognito

C.zh: Amazon Athena
C.en: Amazon Athena

D.zh: Amazon EC2
D.en: Amazon EC2

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，适合运行短期代码片段，而不是部署需要特定 CPU、内存、存储和网络配置的应用程序。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service suitable for running short-lived snippets of code rather than deploying applications that require specific CPU, memory, storage, and network configurations.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Cognito 是一项用于用户验证和管理的服务，与部署应用程序无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Cognito is a service for user authentication and management, independent of deploying applications.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Athena 是一项交互式查询服务，用于分析 Amazon S3 中存储的数据，而不是用于部署应用程序。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Athena is an interactive query service for analyzing data stored in Amazon S3, not for deploying applications.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon EC2（弹性计算云）提供可设置的虚拟服务器实例，支持各种 CPU、内存、存储和网络配置，适合部署自定义应用程序。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon EC2 (Elastic Compute Cloud) provides configurable virtual server instances that support various CPU, memory, storage, and network configurations and are suitable for deploying custom applications.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon EC2（弹性计算云）提供可设置的虚拟服务器实例，支持各种 CPU、内存、存储和网络配置，适合部署自定义应用程序。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). question_text.en: A company wants to monitor and block malicious HTTP and HTTPS requests that its Amazon CloudFront distributions receive. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
A.en: Amazon GuardDuty

B.zh: Amazon Inspector
B.en: Amazon Inspector

C.zh: AWS WAF
C.en: AWS WAF

D.zh: Amazon Detective
D.en: Amazon Detective

A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a threat detection service that identifies potentially malicious activity and unauthorized behavior, but it cannot directly monitor and block HTTP and HTTPS requests. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Inspector 是一项自动化安全评估服务，用于检查应用程序是否有安全漏洞，但与监控和封锁 HTTP 和 HTTPS 请求无关。因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an automated security assessment service that checks applications for security vulnerabilities, but it has nothing to do with the monitoring and blocking of HTTP and HTTPS requests. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS WAF 是一种 Web 应用程序防火墙服务，旨在监视和阻止恶意 HTTP 和 HTTPS 请求。这正是题目要求的功能，所以该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a web application firewall service designed to monitor and block malicious HTTP and HTTPS requests. This is exactly the function required by the question, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Detective 是用来调查和分析安全问题的服务，但它不能直接监控和阻止HTTP和HTTPS请求。因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service used to investigate and analyze security issues, but it cannot directly monitor and block HTTP and HTTPS requests. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS WAF 是一种 Web 应用程序防火墙服务，旨在监视和阻止恶意 HTTP 和 HTTPS 请求。这正是题目要求的功能，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a web application firewall service designed to monitor and block malicious HTTP and HTTPS requests. This is exactly the function required by the question, so this option is.

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服务可以托管 PostgreSQL 数据库？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which AWS services can host PostgreSQL databases? (Choose two.)

A.zh: Amazon S3
A.en: Amazon S3

B.zh: Amazon Aurora
B.en: Amazon Aurora

C.zh: Amazon EC2
C.en: Amazon EC2

D.zh: Amazon OpenSearch Service
D.en: Amazon OpenSearch Service

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 是一种对象存储服务，主要用于存储文件和数据对象，不支持托管数据库。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is an object storage service, mainly used to store files and data objects, and does not support managed databases.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是一项高性能关系数据库服务，支持 PostgreSQL 和 MySQL 数据库引擎。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Aurora is a high-performance relational database service that supports PostgreSQL and MySQL database engines.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：虽然Amazon EC2本身不是数据库服务，但用户可以在EC2实例上安装并运行PostgreSQL数据库，因此它可以托管PostgreSQL。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Although Amazon EC2 itself is not a database service, users can install and run a PostgreSQL database on an EC2 instance, so it can host PostgreSQL.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon OpenSearch Service 是一项用于搜索和分析的服务，不支持托管 PostgreSQL 数据库。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon OpenSearch Service is a service for search and analysis and does not support hosting PostgreSQL databases.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EFS 是一种文件存储服务，主要用于存储文档数据，不支持托管数据库。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EFS is a file storage service, mainly used to store file data and does not support managed databases.

answer_text.en: B. Amazon Aurora; C. Amazon EC2

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Aurora 是一项高性能关系数据库服务，支持 PostgreSQL 和 MySQL 数据库引擎。；虽然Amazon EC2本身不是数据库服务，但用户可以在EC2实例上安装并运行PostgreSQL数据库，因此它可以托管PostgreSQL。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Aurora is a high-performance relational database service that supports PostgreSQL and MySQL database engines.; Although Amazon EC2 itself is not a database service, users can install and run a PostgreSQL database on an EC2 instance, so it can host PostgreSQL.

A.en: Amazon Cognito

D.en: Amazon Inspector

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项 主要用于用户认证和管理，帮助开发者轻松添加用户注册功能。它不涉及生成审计信息，因此该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is mainly used for user authentication and management, helping developers easily add user registration functions. It does not involve generating audit information, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon FSx 是一种托管文件存储服务，主要旨在提供高性能文档存储。它没有产生审计信息的能力，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a managed file storage service primarily designed to provide high-performance file storage. It does not have the capability to generate audit information, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Config 是一项用于记录和评估AWS资源配置状态的服务。它可以生成详细的资源配置历史记录和合规性报告，可供外部审计使用，所以该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a service used to record and evaluate the configuration status of AWS resources. It can generate detailed resource configuration history and compliance reports that can be used by external audits, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Inspector 是一项自动化安全评估服务，用于检查应用程序的安全性和合规性。虽然它可以提供安全评估报告，但其主要功能不是产生资源配置信息以供外部审计，因此该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an automated security assessment service that checks applications for security and compliance. Although it can provide security assessment reports, its primary function is not to generate resource configuration information for external auditing, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Config 是一项用于记录和评估AWS资源配置状态的服务。它可以生成详细的资源配置历史记录和合规性报告，可供外部审计使用，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a service used to record and evaluate the configuration status of AWS resources. It can generate detailed resource configuration history and compliance reports that can be used by external audits, so this option is.

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服务或功能需要网络服务供应商 (ISP) 和主机设施来实施？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or feature requires an internet service provider (ISP) and a colocation facility to be implemented?

A.zh: AWS VPN
A.en: AWS VPN

B.zh: Amazon Connect
B.en: Amazon Connect

C.zh: AWS Direct Connect
C.en: AWS Direct Connect

D.zh: 互联网网关
D.en: Internet gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS VPN 是一种虚拟私人网络服务，可通过 Internet 连接到 AWS 环境，无需 ISP 和专用实体设施（例如托管设施）。因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a virtual private network service that connects to the AWS environment over the Internet without requiring an ISP and dedicated physical facilities (such as a colocation facility). Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是一种基于云的联系中心服务，完全托管在 AWS 上，不需要 ISP 或托管设施来实施。因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a cloud-based contact center service that is fully hosted on AWS and does not require an ISP or colocation facility to implement. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一种专用网络连接服务，需要通过 ISP 和托管设施与 AWS 创建专线连接。这是正确的答案。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a dedicated network connection service that requires a dedicated line connection to AWS through ISP and colocation facilities. This is the correct answer.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：互联网网关 是用于将 VPC 连接到 Internet 的虚拟设备。它不需要 ISP 或托管设施来实施。因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a virtual device used to connect a VPC to the Internet. It does not require an ISP or colocation facility to implement it. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (75%) A (25%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Direct Connect 是一种专用网络连接服务，需要通过 ISP 和托管设施与 AWS 创建专线连接。这是正确的答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (75%) A (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a dedicated network connection service that requires a dedicated line connection to AWS through ISP and colocation facilities. This is the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望其 Amazon EC2 实例能够在高度可用的环境中运行，即使特定地理区域发生自然灾害也是如此。哪种解决方案可以实现这一目标？
question_text.en: A company wants its Amazon EC2 instances to operate in a highly available environment, even if there is a natural disaster in a particular geographic area. Which solution achieves this goal?

A.zh: 在多个 AWS 区域中使用 EC2 实例。
A.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple AWS Regions.

B.zh: 在多个边缘位置使用 EC2 实例。
B.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple edge locations.

C.zh: 在同一可用区但不同 AWS 区域中使用 EC2 实例。
C.en: Use EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone but in different AWS Regions.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudFront，并将 EC2 实例配置为来源。
D.en: Use Amazon CloudFront with the EC2 instances configured as the source.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 区域是地理上分布的独立区域。跨多个Region的EC2实例可以保证即使一个Region因自然灾害而不可用，其他Region仍然可以正常运行，从而实现高可用性。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Regions are geographically distributed independent regions. EC2 instances across multiple Regions can ensure that even if one Region is unavailable due to a natural disaster, other Regions can still run normally, thus achieving high availability.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Edge Locations 是 Amazon CloudFront 的用于内容分发的组件。它主要用于存储和加速内容交付，不用于运行EC2实例。它们不能用于实现 EC2 实例的高可用性。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Edge Locations is Amazon CloudFront's groupware for content distribution. It is mainly used to store and accelerate content delivery, and is not used to run EC2 instances. They cannot be used to implement high availability of EC2 instances.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：同一可用区不能跨越多个 AWS 区域。可用区属于特定区域，因此该选项在技术上是可行的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The same Availability Zone cannot span multiple AWS Regions. Availability Zones belong to a specific Region, so this option is technically.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudFront 是一项内容传递服务，用于加速内容交付，并非用于实现 EC2 实例的高可用性。 CloudFront虽然可以与EC2实例集成，但无法解决自然灾害导致的Region不可用的问题。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon CloudFront is a content distribution service that is used to accelerate content delivery and is not used to achieve high availability of EC2 instances. Although CloudFront can be integrated with EC2 instances, it cannot solve the problem of Region unavailability caused by natural disasters.

answer_text.zh: A. 在多个 AWS 区域中使用 EC2 实例。
answer_text.en: A. Use EC2 instances in multiple AWS Regions.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 区域是地理上分布的独立区域。跨多个Region的EC2实例可以保证即使一个Region因自然灾害而不可用，其他Region仍然可以正常运行，从而实现高可用性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Regions are geographically distributed independent regions. EC2 instances across multiple Regions can ensure that even if one Region is unavailable due to a natural disaster, other Regions can still run normally, thus achieving high availability.

question_text.zh: 哪种 AWS 服务允许在多个 Amazon EC2 实例之间共用文件？
question_text.en: Which AWS service allows for file sharing between multiple Amazon EC2 instances?

A.zh: AWS Direct Connect
A.en: AWS Direct Connect

B.zh: AWS Snowball Edge
B.en: AWS Snowball Edge

C.zh: AWS Backup
C.en: AWS Backup

D.zh: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
D.en: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一项网络服务，用于在本地数据中心与 AWS 之间创建私人网络连接，不涉及文件共用功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Direct Connect is a network service used to establish a private network connection between a local data center and AWS and does not involve file sharing functions.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Snowball Edge 是一种数据迁移设备，主要用于将大量数据迁移到 AWS 云，不适合实时文件共用。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Snowball Edge is a data migration device mainly used to migrate large amounts of data to the AWS cloud and is not suitable for real-time file sharing.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Backup 是一项用于备份和还原数据的集中式备份服务。不支持文档共享功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Backup is a centralized backup service used to back up and restore data. It does not support file sharing functions.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon EFS 是完全托管的文件存储服务，支持多个 Amazon EC2 实例之间的文件共用。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports file sharing among multiple Amazon EC2 instances.

answer_text.zh: D. Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
answer_text.en: D. Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon EFS 是完全托管的文件存储服务，支持多个 Amazon EC2 实例之间的文件共用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports file sharing among multiple Amazon EC2 instances.

question_text.zh: 本公司需要管理 AWS Organizations 中同一组织内 AWS 账户的多个登录。公司应该使用哪种 AWS 服务来满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to manage multiple logins across AWS accounts within the same organization in AWS Organizations. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?

A.zh: Amazon VPC
A.en: Amazon VPC

B.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.en: AWS IAM Identity Center

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon VPC（虚拟私有云）用于创建隔离的网络环境，与管理用户登录无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) is used to create an isolated network environment and has nothing to do with managing user logins.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一项威胁检测服务，用于监控恶意活动，与用户登录管理无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service that monitors malicious activity and has nothing to do with user login management.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Cognito 主要用于管理应用程序的用户验证和授权，而不是跨 AWS 账户的登录管理。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Cognito is primarily used to manage user authentication and authorization for applications, not login management across AWS accounts.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS IAM Identity Center（以前称为 AWS SSO）是专门用于管理跨 AWS 账户登录的服务，支持集中式身份识别管理和单一登录功能。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly AWS SSO) is a service specifically used to manage cross-AWS account logins, supporting centralized identity management and single sign-on functions.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS IAM Identity Center（以前称为 AWS SSO）是专门用于管理跨 AWS 账户登录的服务，支持集中式身份识别管理和单一登录功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly AWS SSO) is a service specifically used to manage cross-AWS account logins, supporting centralized identity management and single sign-on functions.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon WorkSpaces。根据 AWS 责任共担模式，哪一项任务是 AWS 的责任？
question_text.en: A company uses Amazon WorkSpaces. Which task is the responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 为每个 WorkSpaces 用户账户设置多重身份验证 (MFA)。
A.en: Set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) for each WorkSpaces user account.

B.zh: 确保托管 WorkSpaces 的 AWS 基础设施的环境安全。
B.en: Ensure the environmental safety and security of the AWS infrastructure that hosts WorkSpaces.

C.zh: 通过 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 为 WorkSpaces 用户账户提供安全性。
C.en: Provide security for WorkSpaces user accounts through AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM).

D.zh: 设置 AWS CloudTrail 以记录 API 调用和用户活动。
D.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to log API calls and user activity.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：设置多重身份验证 (MFA) 是客户的责任，因为它属于用户账户管理和身份验证的范围，这是责任共担模式中客户的责任。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Setting up multi-factor authentication (MFA) is the customer's responsibility as it falls under the umbrella of user account management and authentication, which is the customer's responsibility in the shared responsibility model.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：模型中，AWS 负责其全球基础设施的安全，包括数据中心物理安全、环境安全和硬件维护。这是 AWS 的责任。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: model, AWS is responsible for the security of its global infrastructure, including data center management security, environment security, and hardware maintenance. This is AWS's responsibility.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：尽管 AWS 提供 IAM 服务，但配置和管理 IAM 策略是客户的责任。客户需要确保其用户账户的安全。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS provides IAM services, configuring and managing IAM policies is the customer's responsibility. Customers are required to ensure the security of their user accounts.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：设置 AWS CloudTrail 是客户的责任，因为它属于客户对其账户和服务的管理范围。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Configuring AWS CloudTrail is the customer's responsibility, as it is within the customer's management of their account and services.

answer_text.zh: B. 确保托管 WorkSpaces 的 AWS 基础设施的环境安全。
answer_text.en: B. Ensure the environmental safety and security of the AWS infrastructure that hosts WorkSpaces.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：模型中，AWS 负责其全球基础设施的安全，包括数据中心物理安全、环境安全和硬件维护。这是 AWS 的责任。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: model, AWS is responsible for the security of its global infrastructure, including data center management security, environment security, and hardware maintenance. This is AWS's responsibility.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在将其公开网站迁移到 AWS。该公司希望在 AWS 上托管网站的网域。公司应该使用哪种 AWS 服务来满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating its public website to AWS. The company wants to host the domain name for the website on AWS. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Lambda
A.en: AWS Lambda

B.zh: Amazon Route 53
B.en: Amazon Route 53

C.zh: Amazon CloudFront
C.en: Amazon CloudFront

D.zh: AWS Direct Connect
D.en: AWS Direct Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，用于运行代码而无需管理服务器。它与网域托管无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service for running code without managing servers. It has nothing to do with domain hosting.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Route 53 是一项可扩展的云域名系统 (DNS) 服务，专为网域托管和管理而设计，使其成为托管网站域名的正确选择。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is a scalable cloud Domain Name System (DNS) service designed for domain name hosting and management, making it the right choice for hosting your website's domain names.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudFront 是一项内容传递网络 (CDN) 服务，用于加速内容分发，但不负责网域托管。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service that is used to accelerate content delivery, but it is not responsible for domain name hosting.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一项网络服务，用于在本地数据中心和 AWS 之间创建专用网络连接，与网域托管无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Direct Connect is a network service used to establish a private network connection between an on-premises data center and AWS, independent of domain name hosting.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Route 53 是一项可扩展的云域名系统 (DNS) 服务，专为网域托管和管理而设计，使其成为托管网站域名的正确选择。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is a scalable cloud Domain Name System (DNS) service designed for domain name hosting and management, making it the right choice for hosting your website's domain names.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用第三方身份提供者 (IdP)。该公司希望为其员工提供对 AWS 账户和服务的访问权限，而无需另一组登录凭证。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company uses a third-party identity provider (IdP). The company wants to provide its employees with access to AWS accounts and services without requiring another set of login credentials. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Directory Service
A.en: AWS Directory Service

B.zh: Amazon Cognito
B.en: Amazon Cognito

C.zh: AWS IAM Identity Center
C.en: AWS IAM Identity Center

D.zh: AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM)
D.en: AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM)

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Directory Service 主要用于与Microsoft Active Directory集成，以协助管理用户和资源的身份验证。虽然它可以提供身份识别管理功能，但它不直接支持通过第三方 IdP 单一登录 (SSO) 到 AWS 账户。因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is mainly used to integrate with Microsoft Active Directory to help manage the authentication of users and resources. While it can provide identity management capabilities, it does not directly support single sign-on (SSO) to AWS accounts through third-party IdPs. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项 主要用于为应用程序提供用户身份验证和管理功能。虽然它支持与第三方 IdP 集成，但其主要用途是为应用程序用户提供身份验证，而不是为员工提供对 AWS 账户和服务的访问权限。因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is primarily used to provide user authentication and management capabilities to applications. While it supports integration with third-party IdPs, its primary use is to provide authentication for application users rather than providing employees with access to AWS accounts and services. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：（以前称为 AWS Single Sign-On）支持与第三方 IdP 集成，并允许员工通过单一登录 (SSO) 访问多个 AWS 账户和服务，而无需额外的登录凭证。这是题要求的功能，所以该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: (formerly AWS Single Sign-On) supports integration with third-party IdPs and allows employees to access multiple AWS accounts and services through single sign-on (SSO) without requiring additional login credentials. This is the function required by the question, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS RAM 用于跨账户共享 AWS 资源，而不是用于管理用户身份或提供单一登录功能。因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS RAM is used to share AWS resources across accounts, not to manage user identities or provide single sign-on functionality. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (79%) B (16%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要：（以前称为 AWS Single Sign-On）支持与第三方 IdP 集成，并允许员工通过单一登录 (SSO) 访问多个 AWS 账户和服务，而无需额外的登录凭证。这是题要求的功能，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (79%) B (16%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: (formerly AWS Single Sign-On) supports integration with third-party IdPs and allows employees to access multiple AWS accounts and services through single sign-on (SSO) without requiring additional login credentials. This is the function required by the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务组合可用于将商业关系型数据库迁移到 Amazon 管理的开源数据库？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which combination of AWS services can be used to move a commercial relational database to an Amazon-managed open-source database? (Choose two.)

A.zh: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)
A.en: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)

B.zh: AWS 软件开发工具包 (SDK)
B.en: AWS software development kits (SDKs)

C.zh: AWS Schema Conversion Tool
C.en: AWS Schema Conversion Tool

D.zh: AWS Systems Manager
D.en: AWS Systems Manager

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS DMS 是一项专门用于迁移数据库的服务，可协助将数据从来源数据库迁移到目标数据库。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS DMS is a service specifically designed to migrate databases and can help migrate data from source databases to target databases.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：SDK主要用于开发AWS服务以及与AWS服务交互，并非专门用于数据库迁移的工具。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SDKs are mainly used for developing and interacting with AWS services, and are not tools specifically used for database migration.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：SCT 可以帮助将来源数据库的架构转换为目标数据库的架构，这在迁移到不同类型的数据库时特别有用。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: SCT can help convert the schema of the source database to the schema of the target database, which is especially useful when migrating to a different type of database.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Systems Manager 主要用于操作任务的管理和自动化，与数据库迁移无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Systems Manager is primarily used for management and automation of operational tasks and has nothing to do with database migration.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EMR 是一项用于大数据处理的服务，与数据库迁移无关。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon EMR is a service for big data processing and has nothing to do with database migration.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)；C. AWS Schema Conversion Tool
answer_text.en: A. AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS); C. AWS Schema Conversion Tool

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AC (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS DMS 是一项专门用于迁移数据库的服务，可协助将数据从来源数据库迁移到目标数据库。；SCT 可以帮助将来源数据库的架构转换为目标数据库的架构，这在迁移到不同类型的数据库时特别有用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS DMS is a service specifically designed to migrate databases and can help migrate data from source databases to target databases.; SCT can help convert the schema of the source database to the schema of the target database, which is especially useful when migrating to a different type of database.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务可让用户按需自助访问 AWS 合规性控制报告？
question_text.en: Which AWS service gives users on-demand, self-service access to AWS compliance control reports?

A.zh: AWS Config
A.en: AWS Config

B.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
B.en: Amazon GuardDuty

C.zh: AWS Trusted Advisor
C.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

D.zh: AWS Artifact
D.en: AWS Artifact

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Config主要用于资源配置的审计和合规性检查，帮助用户追踪AWS资源的配置变化，但不提供合规性控制报告。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Config is mainly used for auditing and compliance checking of resource configuration, helping users track configuration changes of AWS resources, but it does not provide compliance control reports.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一种威胁检测服务，用于识别潜在的安全威胁，与合规性控制报告无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify potential security threats, independent of compliance control reporting.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Trusted Advisor 提供优化建议来帮助用户提高安全性、性能和成本效率，但不提供合规性控制报告。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor provides optimization recommendations to help users improve security, performance, and cost efficiency, but it does not provide compliance control reports.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Artifact 是一个合规性报告门户，让用户可以按需访问 AWS 的合规性控制报告和其他相关文档。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Artifact is a compliance reporting portal that provides users with on-demand access to AWS' compliance control reports and other related documents.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Artifact 是一个合规性报告门户，让用户可以按需访问 AWS 的合规性控制报告和其他相关文档。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Artifact is a compliance reporting portal that provides users with on-demand access to AWS' compliance control reports and other related documents.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地数据中心运行旧工作负载。该公司希望将工作负载迁移到 AWS。该公司不想对工作量进行任何改变。公司应该使用哪种迁移策略？
question_text.en: A company runs a legacy workload in an on-premises data center. The company wants to migrate the workload to AWS. The company does not want to make any changes to the workload. Which migration strategy should the company use?

A.zh: 回购
A.en: Repurchase

B.zh: 平台重构
B.en: Replatform

C.zh: 重新主持
C.en: Rehost

D.zh: 重构
D.en: Refactor

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：回购 是指以新的解决方案取代现有应用，例如从自建系统迁移到SaaS解决方案。这种方法通常需要更换应用程序，不符合题中「不改变」的要求，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to replacing existing applications with new solutions, such as migrating from self-built systems to SaaS solutions. This method usually requires replacing the application, which does not meet the requirement of "no changes" in the question, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：平台重构 是指对应用程序进行轻微的优化或调整以适应云环境，例如数据库或操作系统的变更。这种方法涉及到一定程度的修改，不符合题中「不修改」的要求，因此不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to slight optimization or adjustment of the application to adapt to the cloud environment, such as changes to the database or operating system. This method involves a certain degree of modification and does not meet the requirement of "no changes" in the question, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：（也称为「直接迁移」）是指将应用程序直接迁移到云环境，而不需要对应用程序进行任何修改。这完全符合题中「不改变」的要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: (also known as "lift-and-shift") refers to the direct migration of an application to a cloud environment without any modifications to the application. This fully complies with the requirement of "no changes" in the question, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：重构 是指对应用程序进行重大修改或重新设计以充分利用云。这种方法需要对应用程序进行大量更改，不符合问题中「不更改」的要求，因此重构 是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the significant modification or redesign of an application to take full advantage of the cloud. This method requires a lot of changes to the application and does not meet the "no changes" requirement in the question, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：（也称为「直接迁移」）是指将应用程序直接迁移到云环境，而不需要对应用程序进行任何修改。这完全符合题中「不改变」的要求，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: (also known as "lift-and-shift") refers to the direct migration of an application to a cloud environment without any modifications to the application. This fully complies with the requirement of "no changes" in the question, so this option is.
